scripts.deploy:migrate: docker compose -f server/docker-compose.yml exec api npm run db:migrate
scripts.build:web: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://veganland.app EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_API_KEY=$(grep APP_API_KEY server/.env | cut -d= -f2) npx expo export --platform web
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:web && cp -r dist/* /var/www/veganland/ && pm2 restart veganland-api && echo '✓ VeganLand deploy concluído'
scripts.build:novaqi: BRAND=novaqi EXPO_PUBLIC_BRAND=novaqi EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://veganland.app EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_API_KEY=$(grep APP_API_KEY server/.env | cut -d= -f2) npx expo export --platform web
scripts.build:novaqi:deploy: npm run build:novaqi && mkdir -p /var/www/veganland/novaqi && cp -r dist/* /var/www/veganland/novaqi/ && echo '✓ NovaQI deploy concluído'
